method.description: 'md5': Keyed MD5; 'meticulous-md5': Meticulous Keyed MD5; 'meticulous-sha1': Meticulous Keyed SHA1; 'sha1': Keyed SHA1; 'simple': Simple Password;

encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED password string)

multiplier.description: Multiplier value used to compute holddown (value used to multiply the interval)

value.description: 'message-digest': Use message-digest authentication; 'null': Use no authentication;

dead-interval.description: Interval after which a neighbor is declared dead (Seconds)

mtu-ignore.description: Ignores the MTU in DBD packets

retransmit-interval.description: Time between retransmitting lost link state advertisements (Seconds)

receive-packet.description: Enable receiving packet through the specified interface

'1': RIP version 1; '2': RIP version 2; '1-2': RIP version 1 & 2;

state.description: 'poisoned': Perform split horizon with poisoned reverse; 'disable': Disable split horizon; 'enable': Perform split horizon without poisoned reverse;

dhcp.description: Use DHCP to configure IP address

cache-spoofing-port.description: This interface connects to spoofing cache

ttl-ignore.description: Ignore TTL decrement for a received packet before sending out

max-resp-time.description: Maximum Response Time (Max Response Time (Default is 100))

server.description: Server facing interface for IPv4/v6 traffic

value.description: 'message-digest': Use message-digest authentication; 'null': Use no authentication;

dead-interval.description: Interval after which a neighbor is declared dead (Seconds)

mtu-ignore.description: Ignores the MTU in DBD packets

state.description: 'poisoned': Perform split horizon with poisoned reverse; 'disable': Disable split horizon; 'enable': Perform split horizon without poisoned reverse;

access-list.description: Access-list for traffic from the outside

ttl-ignore.description: Ignore TTL decrement for a received packet before sending out

v6-acl-name.description: Apply ACL rules to incoming packets on this interface (Named Access List)

inbound.description: ACL applied on incoming packets to this interface

action.description: 'enable': Enable Router Advertisements on this interface; 'disable': Disable Router Advertisements on this interface;

max-interval.description: Set Router Advertisement Max Interval (default: 600) (Max Router Advertisement Interval (seconds))

min-interval.description: Set Router Advertisement Min Interval (default: 200) (Min Router Advertisement Interval (seconds))

default-lifetime.description: Set Router Advertisement Default Lifetime (default: 1800) (Default Lifetime (seconds))

rate-limit.description: Rate Limit the processing of incoming Router Solicitations (Max Number of Router Solicitations to process per second)

reachable-time.description: Set Router Advertisement Reachable ime (default: 0) (Reachable Time (milliseconds))

managed-config-action.description: 'enable': Enable the Managed Address Configuration flag; 'disable': Disable the Managed Address Configuration flag (default);

other-config-action.description: 'enable': Enable the Other Stateful Configuration flag; 'disable': Disable the Other Stateful Configuration flag (default);

use-floating-ip.description: Use a floating IP as the source address for Router advertisements

floating-ip.description: Use a floating IP as the source address for Router advertisements

use-floating-ip-default-vrid.description: Use a floating IP as the source address for Router advertisements

floating-ip-default-vrid.description: Use a floating IP as the source address for Router advertisements

access-list.description: Access-list for traffic from the outside

circuit-type.description: 'level-1': Level-1 only adjacencies are formed; 'level-1-2': Level-1-2 adjacencies are formed; 'level-2-only': Level-2 only adjacencies are formed;

padding.description: Add padding to IS-IS hello packets

lsp-interval.description: Set LSP transmission interval (LSP transmission interval (milliseconds))

value.description: Mesh group number

network.description: 'broadcast': Specify IS-IS broadcast multi-access network; 'point-to-point': Specify IS-IS point-to-point network;

retransmit-interval.description: Set per-LSP retransmission interval (Interval between retransmissions of the same LSP (seconds))

tx-dot1-tlvs.description: Interface lldp tx IEEE 802.1 Organizationally specific TLVs configuration

exclude.description: Configure which TLVs excluded. All basic TLVs will be included by default

inside.description: Configure MAP inside interface (connected to MAP domains)

map-t-inside.description: Configure MAP inside interface (connected to MAP domains)

bind-type.description: 'inside': This interface is connected to NPTv6 inside networks; 'outside': This interface is connected to NPTv6 outside networks;

port-priority.description: Set LACP priority for a port (LACP port priority)

fast.description: fast timeout in unit of milli-seconds(default 1000)

slow.description: slow timeout in unit of seconds

mode.description: 'active': enable initiation of LACP negotiation on a port(default); 'passive': disable initiation of LACP negotiation on a port;

timeout.description: 'long': Set LACP long timeout (default); 'short': Set LACP short timeout;

load-interval.description: Configure Load Interval (Seconds (5-300, Multiple of 5), default 300)

media-type-copper.description: Set the media type to copper

port-breakout.description: '4x10G': Breakout 100G/40G ports into 4x10G ports; '4x25G': Breakout 100G ports into 4x25G ports; '2x50G': Breakout 100G ports into 2x50G ports;

speed-forced-1g.description: force the speed to be 1G on 25G link

speed-forced-10g.description: force the speed to be 10G on 25G link

speed-forced-40g.description: force the speed to be 40G on 100G link

remove-vlan-tag.description: Remove the vlan tag for egressing packets

mtu.description: Interface mtu (Interface MTU (min MTU is 1280 for IPv6))

flow-control.description: Enable 802.3x flow control on full duplex port

normal.description: Normal rate limit. If exceeds this limit, drop the ICMP packet that goes over the limit

lockup.description: Enter lockup state when ICMP rate exceeds lockup rate limit (Maximum rate limit. If exceeds this limit, drop all ICMP packet for a time period)

normal-v6.description: Normal rate limit. If exceeds this limit, drop the ICMP packet that goes over the limit

lockup-v6.description: Enter lockup state when ICMP rate exceeds lockup rate limit (Maximum rate limit. If exceeds this limit, drop all ICMP packet for a time period)

cpu-process-dir.description: 'primary': Primary board; 'blade': blade board; 'hash-dip': Hash based on the Destination IP; 'hash-sip': Hash based on the Source IP; 'hash-dmac': Hash based on the Destination MAC; 'hash-smac': Hash based on the Source MAC;
